$comment: c82 D-FFI-SHELL-STDIO-SEMANTIC-SURFACE: FILE ships as a typedef (opaque struct "FILE" {} — block-scope `FILE *f;` PARSES via the shipped-typedef oracle and file-scope `static FILE *gLog;` resolves), size_t/NULL ride stdio.h (C89 7.19.1), and the printf family ships as VARIADIC externs — printf/fprintf/sprintf/sscanf + vfprintf taking a REAL `va_list` (descriptor-spelled, reader-resolved to the active CC's type) through a shell.c-cli_printf-shaped forwarder. Writes+reads back a temp file: vfprintf "40 2" -> fread (size_t) -> sscanf -> 40+2 = 42; sprintf/strlen cross-check. The arm64 leg exercises the AAPCS64 32-byte struct va_list against REAL glibc vfprintf. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop stdio.json's typedefs -> S0006/S0001 on the FILE decls; drop the va_list named-type thread -> stdio.json read fails loud. gcc -std=c17 cross-checked (42).
